positive: A mesmerizing, intricate vector illustration of a bioluminescent celestial forest. The scene features stylized, glowing giant mushrooms and crystalline cosmic formations interwoven with the elegant silhouettes of ancient, stylized trees. Deep space nebulae and flowing nebula dust patterns dominate the background, providing a vibrant color palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, and electric violet. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing clean lines and strong contrast. The overall aesthetic should be high-detail graphic novel style, suitable for a large, flat apparel print, with crisp edges and glowing elements.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature
